offer: For restaurant back-office teams processing 10-20 payrolls/month, manual payroll processing causes late payments to staff. We automate payroll instead of manual payroll processing using spreadsheets.
problem: manual payroll processing leads to errors and delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant payroll help
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll challenges
DM outreach to restaurant back-office teams with demos
Community forums sharing payroll processing tools
try_it: Let users try HR reporting templates and dashboard features
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Make a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
